span.p:
Soil Moisture Sensor
AO -> GPIO34
VCC -> 3V3/5V
GND -> GND

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Water Level Sensor
AO -> GPIO35
VCC -> 3V3/5V
GND -> GND

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Rain Sensor
AO -> GPIO32
VCC -> 3V3/5V
GND -> GND

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
DS18B20
DQ -> GPIO19
VCC -> 3V3
GND -> GND
4.7k pull-up: DQ to VCC

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
DHT11
DATA -> GPIO4
VCC -> 3V3/5V
GND -> GND

div.style: color: rgb(76, 29, 149) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
OLED SH1106 I2C
SDA -> GPIO21
SCL -> GPIO22
VCC -> 3V3/5V
GND -> GND

div.style: color: rgb(136, 19, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Relay Module
IN -> GPIO26
VCC -> 5V
GND -> common GND

div.style: color: rgb(136, 19, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
External Pump Power Supply
Positive -> Relay COM
Negative -> Pump -
